seoDescription: Explore job openings at Aivora. We're looking for talented engineers, designers, and product managers.
keywords: Aivora jobs, software engineer openings, designer careers, work at Aivora
headline: CAREERS
subheadline: Build the Future of Digital Products
supportingText: We are always looking for talented, passionate individuals to join our product and engineering team.
intro: At Aivora, you'll work on cutting-edge AI and modern software projects alongside a team of dedicated designers and engineers. We value high craftsmanship, continuous learning, and clean, resilient systems.
applyText: Check back for updates or email us your CV / resume at

positions.title: Software Engineer
positions.description: Build scalable Next.js applications and lead key feature development with high quality standards.

positions.title: UI/UX Designer

positions.title: Backend Engineer
